raw_consumer_statement: Transaction dated XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX with XXXX for a car rental with XXXX in XXXX. Was charged twice that date for {$1500.00} each, but one was refunded correctly. Second charge was for the actual reservation which was to have the one-way rental fee waived. Upon returning the car with XXXX I was charged the {$150.00} one-way fee anyway because XXXX did not make this agreement with XXXX. I spoke with XXXX and XXXX many times and XXXX has been unable to resolve the issue, just telling me they are working on it ( months later still ). I filed disputes with American Express for the {$150.00} charge and each time they say the issue has been resolved because XXXX refunded one of the initial transactions. They don't read the dispute or attached documentation- they don't even acknowledge I am only disputing the {$150.00} portion of it. I have spoken to numerous agents trying to resolve the issue and they can not- they just open new disputes, make me reupload all the documentation, and then inform me it was already resolve back in XXXX with the refund of the erroneous transaction. I have no other recourse than to file this complaint now.
